name: Service Binary Located in a Shared Folder
notes: This rule triggers when a service binary is located in a shared folder.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set), (5002197) A service was installed in a system

when the event matches (qid = 5002197 and "Service Filename" MATCHES '\\\\.*' ) or (qid = 5001832 and "Target Object" MATCHES '.*\\Services\\.*\\ImagePath' and "Target Details" MATCHES '\\\\.*') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Service Binary Located in a Shared Folder on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set), (5002197) A service was installed in a system

AND when the event matches (qid = 5002197 and "Service Filename" MATCHES '\\\\.*' ) or (qid = 5001832 and "Target Object" MATCHES '.*\\Services\\.*\\ImagePath' and "Target Details" MATCHES '\\\\.*') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Detected a Service with an Executable Binary Located in a Shared Folder
Event description: Detected a Service with an Executable Binary Located in a Shared Folder
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
